---
title: "Vodič · Interesne skupine"
toc: false
number-sections: false
lang: hr-HR
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-classes: vd-page
---

```{=html}
<div class="vd-dio-2">

<div class="vd-folio">
  <div class="vd-folio-left">
    <a class="vd-back" href="../vodic.html">← Vodič</a>
    <span class="vd-folio-chapter">Dio II · Poglavlje 8 · Interesne skupine</span>
  </div>
  <div class="vd-folio-meta">
    <span>2 min čitanja</span>
    <span>Mapa 8 od 22</span>
  </div>
</div>

<h1 class="vd-question">Kako mali često pobijede&nbsp;velike?</h1>

<div class="vd-map">
  <ol class="vd-branches" aria-label="Pet ideja poglavlja o interesnim skupinama">

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#logika-kolektivnog-djelovanja">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="7" cy="12" r="4.5"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="6.5" r="1.2"/><circle cx="19.5" cy="11" r="1.2"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="15.5" r="1.2"/><circle cx="20" cy="18.5" r="1.2"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Logika kolektivnog djelovanja</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Mali se organiziraju lako, velikima se ne isplati ni sastanak.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#koncentrirane-koristi-raspršeni-troškovi">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 11l13-6v14L3 13v-2Z"/><path d="M16 9a4 4 0 0 1 0 6"/><path d="M5 13v5h3v-4"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Glasna manjina, tiha većina</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Koncentrirana korist viče, raspršeni trošak šuti. Politika čuje samo prvu.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#lov-na-rentu">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M14.5 8.5c-.5-1-1.5-1.5-2.5-1.5-1.5 0-2.5 1-2.5 2.2 0 2.8 5 1.6 5 4.4 0 1.2-1 2.2-2.5 2.2-1.2 0-2.2-.6-2.7-1.6"/><path d="M12 5.5V7m0 10v1.5"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Lov na rentu</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Resursi idu na izvlačenje privilegija umjesto u proizvodnju. Šteta i kad je zakonito.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#regulatorno-zarobljavanje">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 11V7a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v4"/><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="1.5"/><path d="M12 15v2"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Regulatorno zarobljavanje</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Regulator s vremenom počne gledati svijet očima industrije koju nadzire.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

    <li class="vd-branch">
      <a class="vd-branch-card" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#zašto-interesne-skupine-nisu-nužno-štetne">
        <span class="vd-branch-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 4v16M8 20h8M5 7h14"/><path d="M5 7l-2.5 6a3 3 0 0 0 5 0L5 7Z"/><path d="M19 7l-2.5 6a3 3 0 0 0 5 0L19 7Z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span>
          <span class="vd-branch-title">Nisu nužno štetne</span>
          <span class="vd-branch-text">Problem nije postojanje interesa nego neravnoteža i netransparentnost utjecaja.</span>
        </span>
      </a>
    </li>

  </ol>
</div>

<div class="vd-cards">

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Politika u praksi</span>
    <p>Poljoprivredni lobiji, sindikati javnih službi i komore u Hrvatskoj. Mali udio u stanovništvu, visoka organiziranost, velik utjecaj.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#logika-kolektivnog-djelovanja">Poglavlje 8 · Kolektivno djelovanje</a>
  </div>

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Jedna brojka</span>
    <span class="vd-big">15&nbsp;%</span>
    <p>Toliki dio BDP a Turska je šezdesetih trošila na borbu za uvozne dozvole. Indija 7,3 posto.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#lov-na-rentu">Poglavlje 8 · Lov na rentu</a>
  </div>

  <div class="vd-card">
    <span class="vd-card-label">Mit i stvarnost</span>
    <p class="vd-mit"><span class="vd-tag">Mit</span>Lobiji pobjeđuju jer su korumpirani.</p>
    <p class="vd-stvar"><span class="vd-tag">Stvarnost</span>I bez ijedne kuverte mala organizirana skupina ima strukturnu prednost nad raspršenom većinom.</p>
    <a class="vd-src" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html#koncentrirane-koristi-raspršeni-troškovi">Poglavlje 8 · Koncentrirano i raspršeno</a>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="vd-pojam">
  <span class="vd-pojam-label">Pojam za razgovor</span>
  <p><span class="vd-pojam-term">lov na rentu</span> <span class="vd-pojam-text">Trošenje truda i novca da pravila preusmjere bogatstvo tebi, umjesto da ga stvaraš.</span></p>
</div>

<nav class="vd-dalje" aria-label="Kamo dalje">
  <a href="07-stranke-izbori.html">← Mapa 7</a>
  <a class="vd-primary" href="../chapters/08-interesne-skupine.html">Otvorite poglavlje u knjizi</a>
  <a href="09-birokracija.html">Mapa 9 →</a>
</nav>

</div>
```
